POST https://chat.openai.com:443/ces/v1/telemetry/intake?ddforward=%2Fapi%2Fv2%2Flogs%3Fddsource%3Dbrowser%26dd-api-key%3Ddummy-token%26dd-evp-origin%3Dbrowser%26dd-request-id%3DREDACTED HTTP/1.1

Accept-Encoding: br\, gzip\, deflate
Accept-Language: REDACTED
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Type: text/plain
Host: chat.openai.com
Sec-Fetch-Mode: cors
User-Agent: node

```
{
  "ok": true,
  "error": null
}
```

http:method is POST
